archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) mixed with High-Contrast Premium Structure

brand.name: Daribnb
brand.tagline: Conciergerie Airbnb & Sous-location professionnelle au Maroc

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF5A5F] hover:bg-[#E0484D] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all shadow-md hover:shadow-lg flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-[#006233] hover:bg-[#004B27] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all shadow-md hover:shadow-lg flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] hover:bg-[#20bd5a] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all shadow-md hover:shadow-lg flex items-center justify-center gap-2

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-shadow duration-300 border border-[#E5E5E5] p-8
cards.glass: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] rounded-2xl p-8

inputs.base: w-full bg-white border border-[#E5E5E5] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF5A5F] focus:border-transparent text-[#1A1A1A] transition-all

sections.name: Header
sections.description: Sticky navigation bar. Left: Daribnb Logo. Center: Services, Loyer Fixe, Tarifs, FAQ. Right: 'Estimer mes revenus' CTA.

sections.name: Hero Section
sections.description: Asymmetric layout inspired by HostnFly. Left text block with value prop 'Conciergerie Airbnb & Loyer fixe garanti'. 6+ years expertise badge. Primary CTA to Simulator. Secondary CTA to WhatsApp. Right side: Large beautiful image of Moroccan Riad with overlapping Revenue Simulator Card.

sections.name: Interactive Revenue Simulator
sections.description: Glassmorphism card overlapping the hero. Select City (Casablanca, Marrakech, etc), Property Type, and Capacity. 'Estimer mes revenus' button.

sections.name: Services Features
sections.description: Bento grid layout showing 360° management: Annonce optimisée, Check-in/out, Ménage pro, Assistance 24/7. Highlight 'Sous-location professionnelle' as a standout feature.

sections.name: How It Works
sections.description: 5 simple steps: 1. RDV téléphonique, 2. Visite, 3. Estimation, 4. Signature, 5. Mise en ligne. Clean horizontal flow or vertical timeline.

sections.name: Why Daribnb
sections.description: Text + Image section highlighting 6 years of Airbnb expertise, local Moroccan market knowledge, and trust.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.description: Cards with quotes from happy property owners. Star ratings (4.8/5).

sections.name: Coverage Map
sections.description: Visual grid or map showcasing 'Tout le Maroc' presence. Images of Casablanca, Marrakech, Rabat.

sections.name: Pricing
sections.description: Clean pricing section. Commission transparent starting at 20% vs Fixed Rent option.

sections.name: FAQ
sections.description: Shadcn Accordion with common questions about the concierge and fixed rent.

sections.name: Footer
sections.description: Dark background (#006233). Daribnb logo. Contact details (email, phone). Links. Legal.

image_urls.description: High-angle view of a traditional Moroccan riad courtyard in Marrakech
Elegant living room featuring a sleek grey sofa and contemporary design elements
A relaxing courtyard with a pool and wooden door.
Aerial photography of white and brown concrete buildings near ocean in Morocco

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement Daribnb as a premium marketing site in French using React and Tailwind. Use Shadcn components for Interactive Simulator, Dropdowns, and FAQ. Strongly emphasize the #FF5A5F (Airbnb Red) for primary interactive elements and CTAs, and #006233 (Moroccan Green) for secondary elements/footer. Ensure 6+ years expertise is highly visible. Build the Revenue Simulator similar to HostnFly's card approach over the hero section. Adhere to 'data-testid' requirements on all interactive elements.
